notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 (Wikipedia x2, Al Jazeera, Yemen Embassy Riyadh): May 22, 1990 unification of Yemen Arab Republic (north) and People's Democratic Republic of Yemen (south); Ali Abdullah Saleh became president, Ali Salim al-Beidh vice president; negotiations spanned 20+ years.
Confirmed official holiday status (national day of the Republic of Yemen).

Sensitive contemporary context (ongoing civil war, southern separatist movement) — content stuck strictly to 1990 historical facts, no commentary on current political divisions, same approach as independence-day-yemen and september-26-revolution-yemen.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ye), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
